message:
fix(vitals): distinguish sibling Gas Town instances from test zombies

On machines with multiple Gas Town workspaces, gt vitals was flagging
sibling Dolt servers as "test zombies" — which could lead to the deacon
killing them. Now checks --data-dir ownership: sibling workspace Dolt
processes are labeled "foreign workspace" (dimmed) instead of "test
zombie" (warning).

Also exports GetDoltDataDirFromProcess so the vitals command can reuse
the same structural process inspection that KillImposters uses.

Fixes #2998.

Co-Authored-By: Cdfghglz <noreply@users.github.com>
